hooks.command: ! grep -ri '"AI Copier\|"FORGE AI\|GRATIS\|kostenlos\|30% Provision\|\$29\|\$49\|\$79\|\$149' src/app/ src/components/ --include='*.tsx' --include='*.jsx' 2>/dev/null || (echo '❌ BLOCKED: Naming/Pricing violation. Run /fix first.' && exit 1)
FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; grep -q 'Risikohinweis\|risk-disclaimer\|Verlustrisiken' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠️ WARNUNG: $FILE hat keinen Risikohinweis!'
